title: Unusually Chewy Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A salty, chewy one-pot dish from Tunisia featuring lamb, olives, and preserved lemon.

ingredients.name: Extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality oil with a fruity flavor

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and cook the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the preserved lemon and cook for 1 minute.
Add the olives, parsley, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes, if using.
Return the lamb to the pot and add 1 cup of water.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Deglaze the pot with 2 tablespoons of water and stir to combine.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with parsley, if desired.
